ddls:
CREATE TABLE "research_staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the staff member */,
  "designation" TEXT /* Designation of the staff member */,
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the department the staff belongs to */,
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the campus the staff works at */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff role (e.g., Junior Research Fellow, Senior Researcher) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the staff member */,
  "date_of_joining" TEXT /* Date when the staff member joined the institution */,
  "supervisor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supervisor (for hierarchical management) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_staff_department_id FOREIGN KEY ("department_id") REFERENCES departments ("department_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_staff_campus_id FOREIGN KEY ("campus_id") REFERENCES campuses ("campus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "departments" (
  "department_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each department */,
  "department_name" TEXT /* Name of the department */,
  "faculty_head" TEXT /* Name of the faculty head of the department */,
  "department_head" TEXT /* Name of the department head */,
  "department_description" TEXT /* Description of the department's research focus */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("department_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campuses" (
  "campus_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campus */,
  "campus_name" TEXT /* Name of the campus */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the campus */,
  "campus_description" TEXT /* Description of the campus facilities and infrastructure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campus_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the research project */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff assigned to the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the project */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., ongoing, completed) */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the research project */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* Type of project (e.g., internal, external, collaborative) */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES research_staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_projects_funding_source FOREIGN KEY ("funding_source") REFERENCES funding_agencies ("agency_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* ID of the author of the publication */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date of publication */,
  "journal_name" TEXT /* Name of the journal where the publication appeared */,
  "volume" TEXT /* Volume number of the journal */,
  "issue" TEXT /* Issue number of the journal */,
  "pages" TEXT /* Page numbers of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES research_staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "emails" (
  "email_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each email correspondence */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff sending the email */,
  "recipient_email" TEXT /* Email address of the recipient */,
  "subject" TEXT /* Subject of the email */,
  "body" TEXT /* Body content of the email */,
  "sent_date" TEXT /* Date when the email was sent */,
  "email_type" TEXT /* Type of email (e.g., project update, meeting invitation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("email_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_emails_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES research_staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meetings" (
  "meeting_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meeting */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member scheduling the meeting */,
  "meeting_date" TEXT /* Date of the meeting */,
  "meeting_time" TEXT /* Time of the meeting */,
  "agenda" TEXT /* Agenda for the meeting */,
  "minutes" TEXT /* Minutes of the meeting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meeting_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_meetings_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES research_staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Junior Research Fellow, Senior Researcher) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Responsibilities associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_attendance" (
  "attendance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each attendance record */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of attendance */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status (e.g., present, absent) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for absence (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("attendance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_attendance_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES research_staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff_projects" (
  "mapping_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the mapping entry */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "role_in_project" TEXT /* Role of the staff member in the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mapping_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_projects_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_staff_projects_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES research_staff ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* ID of the staff member receiving feedback */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project related to the feedback */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text content of the feedback */,
  "submitted_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating (1-5) associated with the feedback */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_staff_id FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id") REFERENCES research_staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_feedback_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "funding_agencies" (
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each funding agency */,
  "agency_name" TEXT /* Name of the funding agency */,
  "agency_description" TEXT /* Description of the agency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "project_funding" (
  "funding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the funding entry */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "agency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the funding agency */,
  "funding_amount" TEXT /* Amount of funding allocated to the project */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("funding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_funding_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_project_funding_agency_id FOREIGN KEY ("agency_id") REFERENCES funding_agencies ("agency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "staff_id_1" INTEGER /* ID of the first staff member */,
  "staff_id_2" INTEGER /* ID of the second staff member */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research project */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., co-authorship, co-investigator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_staff_id_2 FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id_2") REFERENCES research_staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_staff_id_1 FOREIGN KEY ("staff_id_1") REFERENCES research_staff ("staff_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES research_projects ("project_id")
)
